lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: Good day, [sir/madam]. Would [sir/madam] care to hire a good butler for 5000 coins?

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: I can fulfill all [sir/madam]'s domestic service needs with efficiency and impeccable manners. I hate to boast, but I can say with confidence that no mortal can make trips to the bank or sawmill faster than I!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about your previous jobs.

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: From a humble beginning as a dish-washer I have worked my way up through the ranks of domestic service in the households of nobles from Varrock and Ardougne. As a life-long servant I have naturally

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: suppressed any personality of my own and trained myself never to use the second person when talking to a superior. I have usually worked in the large households of the aristocracy, but now that such a large

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: number of private persons are building their own houses I decided to offer them my services.

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: I must respectfully decline, [sir/madam]. I offer a very exclusive service and will only work for people with over level 40 Construction.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're hired... well, I don't have the money on me, but can I owe you? I'm good for it, honest.

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: I regret that I cannot agree to begin my duties until I have been paid.

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: Thank you, [sir/madam]. I can start work immediately.

sections.title: If the player has not yet asked the Butler to perform a task

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: Very good, [sir/madam]. [Sir/Madam]'s tea will be ready shortly.

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: I regret that I cannot make a meal unless [sir/madam] has a dining table for me to serve it on.

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: I cannot serve drinks unless you have a kitchen with an ale barrel, [sir/madam].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you fetch something from the bank for me?

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: Certainly, [sir/madam]. If [sir/madam] would simply tell me the items [he/she] requires?

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: Certainly, [sir/madam]. If [sir/madam] would care to give me the logs?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stay at the entrance and greet guests.

sections.title: If the player has asked the Butler to perform a bank/sawmill task
If the Butler requires payment from Player

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: If you do not pay me I will have to give you my notice, sir. My fee is 5000 coins.

sections.title: If the player "Uses" an item on the Butler

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: Shall I take that to the bank, [sir/madam]?

sections.title: If the player "Uses" logs on the Butler

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: Shall I take that to the bank or to the sawmill, [sir/madam]?

sections.title: When the Butler greets a guest

lines.speaker: Butler
lines.text: [player name] is entertaining in the [room]. Would [sir/madam] care to follow me?
